summary: Full backend and frontend testing completed for Vinyl Variant & Value Pages feature. All 16 backend API tests pass (100%), all frontend UI tests pass. Discogs API integration is working correctly with live data. SSR endpoint returns proper HTML with all required meta tags and JSON-LD structured data.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Backend /api/vinyl/{artist}/{album}/{variant} returns correct variant_overview with all Discogs-sourced data (artist, album, variant, year, cover_url, label, catalog_number, pressing_country, discogs_id, format)
PASS: data_source field confirms discogs_fetched=true and discogs_market_fetched=true for valid records
PASS: value field contains discogs_median, discogs_low, discogs_high from Discogs market data
PASS: seo field has proper title, description, canonical URL, and image
PASS: SSR endpoint /api/vinyl/ssr/{artist}/{album}/{variant} returns HTML with og:title, og:image, og:description, twitter:card, JSON-LD structured data, and vinyl-specific meta tags
PASS: Graceful handling of nonexistent variants (returns 200 with empty/null values, no 500 errors)
PASS: Frontend renders variant-overview section with album art, title, artist, variant pill, metadata badges
PASS: Market Value section displays Discogs pricing data (median, high, low) with 'via Discogs' labels
PASS: Collectors Who Own It section displays owner @katieintheafterglow
PASS: SEOHead component properly injects meta tags into page head
test_credentials: No auth required - vinyl variant pages are public
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test records (Chappell Roan Pink Pony Club, Charli XCX Brat)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vinyl Variant Pages feature fully tested. Backend API endpoints (/api/vinyl/{artist}/{album}/{variant} and /api/vinyl/ssr/{artist}/{album}/{variant}) working correctly with live Discogs API. Frontend VinylVariantPage.js renders all sections properly. Test records: Chappell Roan - Pink Pony Club (Baby Pink) [discogs_id: 31785674], Charli XCX - Brat (Black Translucent) [discogs_id: 30984958]. Collector @katieintheafterglow owns both records.
